top_signals.title: Stock Losses Extend on Tech Weakness, Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian equities dropped as technology shares came under renewed selling pressure as investors rotated into other corners of the market. Oil rose after a Qatari LNG ship was struck.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US Loses to Belgium in World Cup Match Amid Controversy
top_signals.summary:
Team USA’s run in the World Cup came to an end on Monday as it failed to make the quarterfinals, while outrage over FIFA’s decision to allow striker Folarin Balogun to play continued to simmer. Bloomberg's Balazs Penz breaks down the latest developments.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Singapore, Zurich and Monaco top costliest cities for luxury spending
top_signals.summary: The cost of maintaining a premium standard of living has risen "significantly" over the past 12 months, according to a report by Julius Baer Group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
